E koho i "Ae mau" inā ʻaʻole ʻoe makemake e ʻike hou i kēia kamaʻilio. Hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻāla hou i kēia kamaʻilio ma nā Koho ma hope.
E kope i ka ʻike debug i ka papa paʻi
ʻAʻohe git repository\nE hoʻohana i ka Huli e wehe i kahi repo.
Wehe i na mea a pau
E koho i kahi waihona waihona git
E hoʻonui i nā mea a pau
E huli i ka waihona o kēia manawa
Hoʻokaʻawale i nā hana (A i Z)
He kikokikona no ka huli ʻana iā
ʻAʻohe ʻaoʻao o ka faila session i koho ʻia.
E hoʻopaʻa mua i kahi macro me ka hoʻohana ʻana i ka Hoʻomaka Hoʻopaʻa.
E mālama i kope e like me
Hōʻike i ke ala waihona piha ma ka papa inoa
Ka helu ʻana o ka maka (ms):
ʻO ka laula o ka ʻaoʻao (pixels):
ʻAʻohe paio pōkole no kēia mea.
Hoʻomaka hou i ka polokalamu e hoʻouka i nā plugins i hoʻokomo ʻia.
Hōʻike i nā mea a pau
E hoʻololi i ke alakaʻi kuhikuhi
ʻAʻole hiki ke nānā i nā mea hou
E hoʻouka i kēia mau plugins?
E hoʻopau kēia i nā faila plugin.
macro i hoʻopaʻa ʻia i kēia manawa
E hoʻopaʻa a mālama i kahi macro ma mua.
Ka inoa kauoha no ka papa kuhikuhi holo
Holoi ʻia nā māka a pau.
Ua kope ʻia ke kikokikona i kaha ʻia i ka papa ʻokiʻoki.
ʻAʻohe kikokikona i kaha ʻia e kope.
Ke pani nei i nā faila...
Hoʻololi i nā papahana: ʻAʻole i pili.
E ʻimi i nā papahana: ʻAʻole i hoʻopili ʻia i ka papa inoa waihona Panel Panel.
Ua hoʻololi ʻia ke kahua hana.
Makemake ʻoe e mālama i nā loli?
Hōʻike i ka laina o kēia manawa
E hoʻohana i nā pā (ma kahi o nā hakahaka)
ʻOka ma waho o ka laina hope
Kope/ʻoki laina me ke koho ʻole
Hoʻopaʻa ʻole i ke kikokikona i koho ʻia
E hoʻā i ka hōʻailona akamai
ʻO ka hōʻailona akamai: hihia hoʻokūkū
Hoʻokalakala akamai: ʻōlelo holoʻokoʻa wale nō
Kaomi pālua e pani i ka pā
Hōʻike i ke pihi pani ma nā ʻaoʻao
E hoʻomanaʻo i ka ʻike ʻana o ka panel ma nā kau
E mālama i nā hoʻokomo faila i ka wā kau
E hōʻoia ma mua o ka mālama ʻana i nā mea a pau
E hōʻoia e hoʻololi i nā mea a pau i nā palapala wehe
Hoʻololi: mai neʻe i kahi hanana aʻe
E hoʻohana i ka monospaced ma ka ʻimi kamaʻilio
Mālama ka kaomi ʻākau i ke koho
Hoʻohuli i ke kauoha paʻamau i ka lā/manawa
E hoʻohana i ka XML-based list list parser
Ke koho ʻana i ka paepae hōʻoia ʻokoʻa (bytes):
E koho i kahi waihona XML kumuhana Notepad++ e hoʻohana
He 0-255 ka nui o ka waiwai a he <= pau ka hoʻomaka.
E hoʻomaka hou i ka Notepad++ no ka hoʻoulu hou ʻana i ka contextMenu.xml paʻamau.
Loaʻa nā loli i mālama ʻole ʻia ka faila.ʻO ka hoʻouka hou ʻana me ka hoʻopili hou e hoʻolei iā lākou.E hoʻomau?
ʻo ia ka mana hou loa.
Ke holo nei ʻoe i kēia manawa
Hiki ke waiho ʻia nā waihona ʻōlelo hou aku (.xml) ma:
Holo i kēia manawa amp;E hele i ka Next Multi-select
E nānā i nā mea hou…

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Hoʻoponopono contextMenu
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: ʻO ka hoʻoponopono ʻana i ka contextMenu.xml hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻololi i kāu Notepad++ popup context menu. Pono ʻoe e hoʻomaka hou i kāu Notepad++ e hana ma hope o ka hoʻololi ʻana i ka contextMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: E mālama i ka hoʻololi o kēia manawa
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
Pono ʻoe e mālama i ka hoʻololi o kēia manawa. ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻopau ʻia nā hoʻololi a pau i mālama ʻia.
E hoʻomau?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Nalo e wehe i ka hiki ke ao mai
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
Pono ʻoe e mālama i ka hoʻololi o kēia manawa. ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻopau ʻia nā hoʻololi a pau i mālama ʻia.
E hoʻomau?

CannotMoveDoc.title: E neʻe i kahi Notepad++ hou
CannotMoveDoc.message: Hoʻololi ʻia ka palapala, mālama a hoʻāʻo hou.

DocReloadWarning.title: Hoʻouka hou
DocReloadWarning.message: Makemake ʻoe e hoʻouka hou i ka faila o kēia manawa a nalowale nā ​​loli i hana ʻia ma Notepad++?

FileLockedWarning.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama
FileLockedWarning.message: E ʻoluʻolu e nānā inā wehe ʻia kēia faila ma kahi papahana ʻē aʻe

FileAlreadyOpenedInNpp.message: Ua wehe ʻia ka faila ma Notepad++.

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: Ua hāʻule ka inoa
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: Hoʻohana ʻia ka inoa i ʻōlelo ʻia ma kahi ʻaoʻao ʻē aʻe.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: Ua hāʻule ka inoa
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻokaʻawale ʻia ka inoa i ʻōlelo ʻia, a ʻaʻole hiki ke loaʻa i kahi (mau) a i ʻole TAB (mau) wale nō.

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Nui loa ka nui o nā faila e wehe ai
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Nā hoʻonohonoho ma Cloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Me he mea lā ua kau ʻia ke ala o ka hoʻonohonoho ʻana ma ke ao ma kahi māka heluhelu wale nō, a i ʻole ma kahi waihona pono pono no ke kākau ʻana. Hoʻopau ʻia kāu mau hoʻonohonoho ma ke ao.E ʻoluʻolu e hoʻihoʻi i kahi waiwai pili ma o ke kamaʻilio Preference.

FilePathNotFoundWarning.title: Waihona waihona
FilePathNotFoundWarning.message: ʻAʻole i loaʻa ka faila āu e hoʻāʻo nei e wehe.

SessionFileInvalidError.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻouka i ke kau
SessionFileInvalidError.message: Ua hewa a ʻaʻole kūpono paha ka faila session.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Hana hewa ʻole
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: Hiki iā ʻoe ke waiho wale i nā faila a i ʻole nā ​​waihona akā ʻaʻole ʻelua, no ka mea ke waiho nei ʻoe i ka Folder e like me ke ʻano Project. Pono ʻoe e ʻae i ka "Wehe i nā faila āpau o ka waihona ma kahi o ka hoʻomaka ʻana i ka Folder e like me Workspace ma ka waiho ʻana o ka waihona" ma ka ʻāpana "Default Directory" o ka ʻōlelo Koho e hana i kēia hana.

SortingError.title: Hapa ka helu ana
SortingError.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke hana i ka hoʻokaʻina helu ma muli o ka laina $INT_REPLACE$.

SortLocaleMultiple.title: ʻAʻole i hoʻokō ʻia
SortLocaleMultiple.message: ʻAʻole kākoʻo ʻia ka hoʻokaʻawale ʻana i nā koho he nui.

SortLocaleUnknown.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke ʻano
SortLocaleUnknown.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻoholo ʻia ke kumu i hāʻule ʻole ai ke ʻano.

ColumnModeTip.title: Manaʻo Kūlana Kūlana
ColumnModeTip.message:
Aia 3 ala e hoʻololi ai i ke ʻano koho kolamu:
1. (Keyboard and Mouse) E paʻa i ka Alt i ka wā e kaomi hema ana
2. (Keyboard wale nō) Paʻa iā Alt+Shift me ka hoʻohana ʻana i nā kī pua
3. (Papa kī a i ʻole ʻiole) E kau i ka pale ma ka hoʻomaka ʻana o ke kūlana poloka kolamu, a laila e hoʻokō i ke kauoha "hoʻomaka / hoʻopau i ke koho ma ke ʻano Column"; E hoʻoneʻe i ka pale i ka hopena i makemake ʻia o ke kūlana poloka kolamu, a laila e hoʻokō hou i ke kauoha "E hoʻomaka / E hoʻopau i ke koho ma ke ʻano Column"

BufferInvalidWarning.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama
BufferInvalidWarning.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama: He kūpono ʻole ka Buffer.

DoCloseOrNot.title: E mālama i ka faila i loaʻa ʻole
DoCloseOrNot.message: ʻAʻole loaʻa ka waihona "$STR_REPLACE$". E mālama i kēia faila ma ka hoʻoponopono?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Holoi i ka waihona
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Ka waihona "$STR_REPLACE$" e hoʻoneʻe ʻia i kāu Recycle Bin a pani ʻia kēia palapala. E hoʻomau?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Mālama
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke loaʻa kāu waihona hoʻihoʻi (hoʻopau ʻia mai waho). E mālama iā ia i ʻole e nalowale kāu ʻikepili Makemake ʻoe e mālama i ka faila "$STR_REPLACE$" ?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Hoʻouka hou
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Ua hoʻololi ʻia kēia faila e kekahi papahana ʻē aʻe. Makemake ʻoe e hoʻouka hou?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Hoʻouka hou
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Ua hoʻololi ʻia kēia faila e kekahi papahana ʻē aʻe. Makemake ʻoe e hoʻouka hou a nalowale nā ​​loli i hana ʻia ma Notepad++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: ʻIke ʻia ka ʻōnaehana prehistoric
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Me he mea lā ke hoʻohana mau nei ʻoe i kahi ʻōnaehana prehistoric.Hana wale kēia hiʻohiʻona ma kahi ʻōnaehana hou, e kala mai.

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Notepad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: ʻAʻole kūpono ka Notepad++ updater me XP ma muli o ka papa palekana obsolete ma lalo o XP. Makemake ʻoe e hele i ka ʻaoʻao Notepad++ e hoʻoiho i ka mana hou?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Hoʻonohonoho Proxy
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: E ʻoluʻolu e hoʻokuʻu hou i ka Notepad++ ma ke ʻano Admin e hoʻonohonoho i ka proxy.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Pilikia ka nānā ʻana
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: He lepo ka palapala.E ʻoluʻolu e mālama i ka hoʻololi ma mua o ka nānā ʻana.

DocNoExistToMonitor.message: Pono e mālama ʻia ka faila.

FileTooBigToOpen.message: Nui loa ka faila ʻaʻole hiki ke wehe ʻia e Notepad++

WantToOpenHugeFile.message: ʻO ka wehe ʻana i kahi faila nui o 2GB+ hiki ke lawe i kekahi mau minuke. Makemake ʻoe e wehe?

CreateNewFileError.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke hana i ka faila "$STR_REPLACE$".

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: Aia kekahi waihona waihona o ka waihona āu e makemake ai e hoʻohui. E ʻoluʻolu e wehe i kona kumu mai ka pā ma mua o kou hoʻohui ʻana i ka waihona "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelChanged.message: Ua hoʻololi ʻia ke kahua hana.Makemake ʻoe e mālama?

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: Ua hewa i ke kākau ʻana i kāu waihona wahi hana. ʻAʻole mālama ʻia kāu wahi hana.

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke wehe ʻia ke kahua hana. Me he mea lā ʻaʻole kūpono ka faila e wehe ai.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: E wehe ʻia nā ʻāpana āpau. Makemake ʻoe e wehe i kēia waihona mai ka papahana?

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: Ua hoʻololi ʻia ke kahua hana o kēia manawa.ʻO ka hoʻouka hou ʻana e hoʻolei i nā hoʻololi āpau. Makemake ʻoe e hoʻomau?

UDLNewNameError.message: Hoʻohana ʻia kēia inoa e kekahi ʻōlelo, e hāʻawi i kekahi.

FindCharRangeValueError.message: Pono ʻoe e kikokiko ma waena o 0 a 255.

OpenInAdminMode.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama ʻia ka faila a hiki ke pale ʻia. Makemake ʻoe e hoʻomaka i ka Notepad++ ma ke ʻano Administrator?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama ʻia ka faila a hiki ke pale ʻia. Makemake ʻoe e hoʻomaka i ka Notepad++ ma ke ʻano Administrator?

OpenInAdminModeFailed.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke wehe ʻia ka Notepad++ ma ke ʻano Administrator.

ViewInBrowser.title: Nānā i ka faila i kēia manawa ma ka polokalamu kele
ViewInBrowser.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke loaʻa ka noi ma kāu ʻōnaehana.

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: Ua kokoke e puka ka Notepad++
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Inā kaomi ʻoe iā YES, e haʻalele ʻoe i ka Notepad++ e hoʻomau i nā hana. E hoʻomaka hou ka Notepad++ ma hope o ka pau ʻana o nā hana āpau. E hoʻomau?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: Pono e hoʻokuʻu hou ʻia ka Notepad++
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: Pono ʻoe e hoʻomaka hou i ka Notepad++ e hoʻouka i nā plugins āu i kau ai.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: Pono e hoʻokuʻu hou ʻia ka Notepad++
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: Pono ʻoe e hoʻomaka hou i ka Notepad++ e hiki ai i ka Change History.

WindowsSessionExit.title: Notepad++ - puka puka Windows session
WindowsSessionExit.message: E hoʻopau ʻia ke kau Windows akā loaʻa iā ʻoe kekahi ʻikepili i mālama ʻole ʻia.Makemake ʻoe e haʻalele i ka Notepad++ i kēia manawa?

LanguageMenuCompactWarning.title: Papa kuhikuhi ʻōlelo paʻakikī
LanguageMenuCompactWarning.message: E hoʻololi ʻia kēia koho i ka hoʻomaka hou ʻana.

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: E hoʻolei ʻia nā loli i mālama ʻole ʻia! Makemake ʻoe e mālama i kāu mau hoʻololi ma mua o ka hoʻololi ʻana i nā kumumanaʻo?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: Macro a me Run Command Compatibility
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
ʻAʻole kūpono paha kāu mau kauoha Macro a Run i mālama ʻia ma Notepad++ v.8.5.2 (a ʻoi aku paha) me ka mana o Notepad++ o kēia manawa. E ʻoluʻolu e hoʻāʻo i kēlā mau kauoha a, inā pono, e hoʻoponopono hou iā lākou.
ʻO kahi ʻē aʻe, hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻohaʻahaʻa i ka Notepad++ v8.5.2 a hoʻihoʻi i kāu ʻikepili mua. E hoʻopaʻa ʻo Notepad++ i kāu "shortcuts.xml" kahiko a mālama iā ia ma ke ʻano he "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Hoʻololi i ka inoa "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", pono e hoʻihoʻi ʻia kāu mau kauoha a hana pono.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama i ka faila. ʻO ka Notepad++ piha heluhelu-wale i ke ʻano pāpā ʻia i pale i ka mālama ʻana i ka faila.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke mālama i ka faila. Me he mea lā ʻaʻole lawa ka lewa ma ka disk e mālama ai i ka faila.ʻAʻole mālama ʻia kāu faila.

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Hiki ʻole ke kiʻi i ka faila
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
ʻAʻole hiki ke kiʻi ʻia kekahi mau faila mai kāu kau i mālama lima ʻia "$STR_REPLACE$".Hiki iā lākou ke wehe ʻia ma ke ʻano he mau palapala hakahaka a heluhelu wale nō ma ke ʻano he mau wahi.
Makemake ʻoe e hana i kēlā mau wahi waiho?
NĀ MEA: ʻAʻole e hoʻololi ʻia kāu kau i mālama lima ʻia ma ka puka ʻana.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Hiki ʻole ke kiʻi i ka faila
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
ʻAʻole hiki ke kiʻi ʻia kekahi mau faila mai kāu kau i hala.Hiki iā lākou ke wehe ʻia ma ke ʻano he mau palapala hakahaka a heluhelu wale nō ma ke ʻano he mau wahi.
Makemake ʻoe e hana i kēlā mau wahi waiho?
KA MANAʻO: Ke koho ʻole e hana i nā mea hoʻopaʻa wahi a i ʻole e pani iā ​​​​lākou ma hope, e hoʻololi ʻia kāu kau ma ka EXIT!Manaʻo mākou iā ʻoe e hoʻihoʻi i kāu "session.xml" i kēia manawa.

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke holo RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: ʻAʻole kūpono ʻo RTL me ke ʻano DirectWrite.E ʻoluʻolu e hoʻopau i ke ʻano DirectWrite ma MISC.ʻāpana o ka ʻōlelo Koho, a hoʻomaka hou i ka Notepad++.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: Hoʻokoe: ʻAʻole i hāʻawi ʻia ka waihona hoʻomanaʻo waihona
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: ʻAʻole paha i lawa ka hoʻomanaʻo manuahi pili ʻole no ka faila i hoʻouka ʻia e Notepad++.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: Ua pio ka huli ʻana i hope regex
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Ma ka paʻamau, ua pio ka huli ʻana i hope regex ma muli o nā hopena i manaʻo ʻole ʻia.No ka huli ʻana i hope, wehe i ke kamaʻilio ʻimi a koho i ke ʻano hulina maʻamau a i ʻole ka hoʻonui ʻia ma kahi o ka ʻōlelo maʻamau. E kaomi i ke pihi OK no ka wehe ʻana i ke kamaʻilio ʻimi a hoʻonohonoho i ka manaʻo ma luna.
Inā makemake ʻoe i ka hiʻohiʻona huli regex hope, e ʻimi i ka manual mea hoʻohana no nā ʻōlelo aʻoaʻo e hiki ai iā ia.

PrintError.message: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻomaka i ka palapala paʻi.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Huli ʻōlelo aʻo
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: Ua hoʻololi 'akomi 'ia ka moku'āina "Ma ke koho". E ʻoluʻolu e hōʻoia i ke kūlana huli ma mua o ka hana ʻana i ka hana.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: Pono e hoʻomaka hou ka Notepad++
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: Pono e hoʻomaka hou ka Notepad++ e hōʻike i nā pōkole papa kuhikuhi pololei.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻololi i ke ʻano heluhelu wale nō i ka faila
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: E ʻoluʻolu e holo i ka Notepad++ ma ke ʻano he luna hoʻoponopono e hoʻololi i nā ʻano faila.

word-chars-list-tip.value: Hāʻawi kēia iā ʻoe e hoʻokomo i kahi huaʻōlelo hou i loko o nā huaʻōlelo o kēia manawa ʻoiai ke kaomi pālua ʻana no ke koho ʻana a i ʻole ka ʻimi ʻana me ka koho "Match whole word only" i nānā ʻia.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: E hele i ka Style Configurator e hoʻololi i ke kala maʻamau EOL ("EOL custom color")..

backup-select-folder.value: E koho i kahi waihona ma ke ʻano he papa kuhikuhi mālama

cloud-select-folder.value: E koho i kahi waihona mai/i kahi o Notepad++ heluhelu/kākau ai i kona mau hoʻonohonoho

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
E huli ma cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
E ʻimi i nā faila a pau koe exe, obj log: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
E huli i nā faila a pau akā e haʻalele i nā hoʻokolohua folder, bin bin64: *.* !\hōʻike !\bin*
E huli i loko o nā faila a pau akā e hoʻokaʻawale i nā waihona āpau a i ʻole nā moʻolelo me ka recursively: *.* !+\log*

find-status-end-reached.value: Huli: Ua hiki i ka hope o ka palapala, ʻike mua ʻia mai luna mai.

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: ʻAʻole hiki ke loaʻa ka hanana i hāʻawi ʻia.Ua poina paha ʻoe e nānā i ka "Wrap around" (to ON), "Match case" (to OFF), a i ʻole "Match whole word only" (to OFF).

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: 'Ōlelo Aʻo: Nā huaʻōlelo ʻike ʻole ʻia ma ke kahua ʻimi (a pani paha). ʻO ka kikokikona i hoʻopili ʻia i loko o kēia kahua e loaʻa nā huaʻōlelo ʻike ʻole (paha laina paha).Inā ʻoe e hoʻomau me ka holoi ʻole ʻana iā lākou, e hoʻokomo ʻia lākou i loko o ka kikokikona hulina (a i ʻole pani).

contextMenu-styleAlloccurrencesOfToken.value: Kāhua i nā hanana a pau o ka hōʻailona

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Hiki i kekahi mau hiʻohiʻona ke lohi i ka hana ma nā faila nui.Hiki ke hoʻopau ʻia kēia mau hiʻohiʻona i ka wehe ʻana i kahi faila nui.Hiki iā ʻoe ke hana iā lākou ma aneʻi.
MANAʻO: 1. Pono ka hoʻololi ʻana i nā koho ma aneʻi e wehe hou i nā faila nui i wehe ʻia i kēia manawa no ka loaʻa ʻana o ka hana kūpono.
2. Inā nānā ʻia ʻo "Deactivate Word Wrap globally" a wehe ʻoe i kahi faila nui, e pio ʻo "Word Wrap" no nā faila āpau.Hiki iā ʻoe ke hana hou iā ia ma o ka papa kuhikuhi "View-> Word Wrap".

npcNote-tip.value:
Hōʻike i nā huaʻōlelo "non-ASCII" i koho ʻia a me ka paʻi ʻole (mana).
MANAʻO: E hoʻopau ka hoʻohana ʻana i ka hōʻike ʻana i nā hopena ʻano ma ke kikokikona.
No ka papa inoa piha o ke keʻokeʻo i koho ʻia a me ka paʻi ʻole ʻana e nānā i ka Manual User.
Kaomi ma kēia pihi e wehe i ka pūnaewele me ka Manual User.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Pōkole : inoa NBSP : wahi haʻi ʻole ZWSP : kahi ākea ʻole ZWNBSP : kahi ākea ʻaʻohe ākea ākea
No ka papa inoa piha e nānā i ka User Manual. Kaomi ma ka "?"pihi ma ka ʻākau e wehe i ka punaewele me ka Manual User.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint : inoa U+00A0 : wahi hoomaha ole U+200B : ākea ākea ʻole U+FEFF : kahi ākea ʻole ka laula ʻole
No ka papa inoa piha e nānā i ka User Manual. Kaomi ma ka "?"pihi ma ka ʻākau e wehe i ka punaewele me ka Manual User.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: E hele i ka Style Configurator e hoʻololi i ka waihoʻoluʻu maʻamau no nā wahi keʻokeʻo i koho ʻia a me nā mea paʻi ʻole ("Non-printing characters custom color").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: E hoʻopili i nā hoʻonohonoho hiʻohiʻona paʻi ʻole i ka C0, ka mana C1 a me ka Unicode EOL (laina aʻe, ka mea hoʻokaʻawale laina a me ka mea hoʻokaʻawale paukū).

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: ʻO ka helu liʻiliʻi o nā huaʻōlelo i koho ʻia ma ka ʻāpana hoʻoponopono e nānā ʻakomi i ka pahu pahu "I ke koho" ke hoʻāla ʻia ke kamaʻilio ʻimi.ʻO ka waiwai nui he $INT_REPLACE$.E hoʻonoho i ka waiwai i 0 e hoʻopau i ka nānā ʻana.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: ʻO ka helu kiʻekiʻe o nā huaʻōlelo i koho ʻia ma ka ʻāpana hoʻoponopono e hoʻopiha aunoa i ke kahua "E ʻimi i ka mea" ke hoʻomaka ʻia ka Ctrl-F.ʻO ka waiwai kiʻekiʻe he $INT_REPLACE$, ʻo ia ka nui kiʻekiʻe o ka mahina "E ʻimi i ka mea", i kaupalena ʻia e ka ʻōnaehana.

verticalEdge-tip.value: E hoʻohui i kāu hōʻailona kolamu ma ka hōʻike ʻana i kona kūlana me kahi helu decimal.Hiki iā ʻoe ke wehewehe i nā hōʻailona kolamu me ka hoʻohana ʻana i ka hakahaka keʻokeʻo e hoʻokaʻawale i nā helu like ʻole.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: E paʻa i ka Shift me ke kaomi ʻana iā Save e wehe i ke kope ma hope o ka mālama ʻana.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: E hōʻoia i ka hoʻopaʻa ʻana o ka laina o kēia manawa (ʻo ia hoʻi ka laina hou i hana ʻia ma ke kaomi ʻana i ke kī ENTER) e like me ka indentation o ka laina mua.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
E ho'ā i ka indentation akamai no nā 'ōlelo "C-like" a me Python.Aia nā ʻōlelo "C-like": C, C++, Java, C#, Objective-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell a me JSON.
Inā koho ʻoe i ke ʻano holomua akā ʻaʻole e hoʻoponopono i nā faila ma nā ʻōlelo i haʻi ʻia aʻe nei, e mau ka indentation ma ke ʻano kumu.

global-override-tip.value: ʻO ka hoʻā ʻana i ka "Global override" ma aneʻi e hoʻopau i kēlā ʻāpana i nā ʻano ʻōlelo āpau.ʻO ka mea āu e makemake ai, ʻo ia ka hoʻohana ʻana i nā hoʻonohonoho "Default Style" ma kahi o

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: Hiki ke hoʻomaikaʻi i ka hāʻawi ʻana i nā kiʻi kūikawā a i ʻole e hoʻoholo i nā pilikia kiʻi, e hoʻomaka hou i ka Notepad++ e hoʻohana i nā loli.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: Hana kēia koho i kāu mau kiʻi hāmeʻa e hahai i ke kala accent system Windows.ʻO ke kala ʻokoʻa ka waihoʻoluʻu koʻikoʻi i hoʻohana ʻia i nā pihi, nā palena, a me nā tile menu Start ma Windows.No ka hoʻololi ʻana, e hele i ka Settings> Personalization> Colors, a laila koho i kāu kala leo makemake.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Ua ʻoi aku ka lōʻihi o ka palena: Ua ʻoi aku paha kāu hoʻokomo i ka palena i ʻae ʻia a ua ʻoki ʻia, ʻaʻole e mālama ʻia no ke kau aʻe.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Ua ʻoi aku paha kāu helu i ka palena i ʻae ʻia a ua ʻoki ʻia, ʻaʻole e mālama ʻia no ke kau aʻe.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: He lōʻihi loa ka lōʻihi o kāu hoʻokomo a ʻaʻole hiki ke mālama ʻia no kāu kau aʻe.

goto-setting-tip.value: E ʻimi i kāu hoʻonohonoho ma aneʻi

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: Hoʻopaʻa i ka lōʻihi ʻike ʻia o nā inoa papa lōʻihi.E hoʻokomo i ka waiwai i hāʻawi ʻia.Ka nui o ka waiwai: 1-257 mau huapalapala (0 hoʻopau i ka ʻoki ʻana).
